text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I really want to stuff myself silly with
something sweet...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
A manju with a thin skin and jam-packed with red
bean paste would be great...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Some yokan would be yummy as well... But ohagi
sounds good too...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...I'll go out and buy some. I can't be bothered to
make them from scratch now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O seems rather fatigued. Looks
like I need to rethink her race schedule.
